assertions.expectation: Recommends combining release channels with maintenance exclusions as the approach for maximum control
assertions.reason: Response clearly demonstrates combining REGULAR release channel with maintenance exclusions (blackout periods) in both YAML and Terraform configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion to prevent disruptive changes while allowing control plane security patches
assertions.reason: Response shows NO_UPGRADES and NO_MINOR_UPGRADES exclusions but doesn't explain that NO_MINOR_UPGRADES allows control plane security patches while preventing disruptive changes

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance windows to control WHEN patches are applied (e.g., weekend windows only)
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed maintenance window configuration with weekly Sunday windows (2-6 AM UTC) in multiple formats and includes validation script

assertions.expectation: Mentions the disruption interval between patch and minor upgrades to prevent back-to-back upgrades
assertions.reason: Response does not mention disruption intervals or preventing back-to-back upgrades between different upgrade types

assertions.expectation: Suggests Stable or Extended channel for production clusters in regulated environments
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR channel instead of STABLE or EXTENDED channels for regulated financial services environment

assertions.expectation: Notes that disabling control plane patches entirely is not recommended due to security risks — monthly patches at minimum
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the security risks of disabling control plane patches entirely or recommend monthly patches as minimum

assertions.expectation: Mentions rollout sequencing for controlling the order of upgrades across multiple clusters
assertions.reason: Response does not discuss rollout sequencing or controlling upgrade order across multiple clusters

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for configuring the recommended exclusion type and maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud commands in the upgrade script and mentions gcloud commands for enabling security features, though not specifically for configuring exclusions
